name: kortex
description: KORTEX — a live flow-graph viewer for Claude Code: watch prompts, tools, and parallel subagents animate in real time with zero-config token, cost, and context tracking.

plugins.name: activity-tracker
plugins.description: Live flow-graph viewer for Claude Code — watch prompts, tools, and parallel subagents animate in real time, with zero-config token, cost, and context-window tracking from the session transcript. Local, zero-dependency.
